description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a textured gray fabric. The sofa features a single, loose green accent pillow placed on the right side, adding a pop of color to the otherwise neutral palette. The seat and backrest are formed from continuous, slightly curved panels, creating a sleek and cohesive silhouette. The armrests are integrated into the body, gently sloping outward and matching the height of the backrest. The sofa stands on four slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners, giving it a light and airy appearance. The upholstery has a subtle woven pattern, contributing to a tactile, semi-soft surface finish.
description: A modern gray fabric sofa with a single green accent pillow, continuous curved back and armrests, and slim black metal legs. The upholstery is textured with a subtle woven pattern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, both seat cushions, the continuous backrest, and the green accent pillow on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the outward slant of the armrest, and the green pillow's position against the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous back panel and the tops of the armrests, with the green pillow barely visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the green pillow more prominently, the armrest's angle, and the sofa's slim profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two attached seat cushions and a continuous, attached backrest; one loose, rectangular green accent pillow on the right.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated, low-profile armrests that slope outward and are level with the backrest, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, straight black metal legs positioned at the corners, exposed and slightly angled outward for stability.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a gentle curve, seamlessly integrated with the armrests and no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Textured woven fabric in a solid gray color, with a subtle, uniform pattern and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
